# [7.0.0](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/compare/v7.0.0-beta.2...v7.0.0) (2023-11-03)

### Features

* **deps:** update dependency mkdocs-material to v9.4.7 ([c3e6465](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/c3e64657a701fff60aea4af5696fc23cf7cd1dc6))
* **admonitions:** use Siemens brand colors and icons ([200e9c8](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/200e9c852c19cae00ddb5081c4bb8795d4a607ea))
* **footer:** implement Siemens Brand footer ([c424066](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/c424066001c49b293e73245e4a7deff4dc0bdc92))
* **icons:** use Siemens Brand for site icons ([99c130e](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/99c130ef3a89996f83c92296f5c1ec0c24bb37b1))
* add support for embedding badges in paragraphs ([c82b69a](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/c82b69a85ad6301f13714ceb6a1ec73830986f13))

### Bug Fixes

* **deps:** require mkdocs 1.5.3 or higher to match mkdocs-material ([84ea6e4](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/84ea6e4aeb7416acc5a7ddd74002510e239be8ed))
* **nav:** increase title contrast on mobile drawer ([14dc5b7](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/14dc5b70001486287e7319bb45c172e1fad315b2))
* **templates:** restructure project to align with mkdocs-material ([318d352](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/318d3524cbfe74f06612e3ce5a4a4613ffc60349))

### BREAKING CHANGES

*  The header/content/footer width is now controlled by
  the `.md-grid` class via `max-width` like done upstream. Please check
  https://code-ops.code.siemens.io/docs-theme/features/#content-area-width
  for more details.

* **languages:** the 'en-custom' language partial is no longer present.
  If you've configured this in your mkdocs.yml configuration, simply omit
  it or provide your own custom partial if you'd like a different title
  for the Table of Contents on your site.

* **partials:** The header and footer partials are no longer duplicated
  in 'partials/siemens/' and the footer copyright has been simplified.
  Please see the upgrade guide on how to update any partial overrides
  you may have if you customize your site.

* Marginal padding overrides on large screens (2000px+) have been removed.
  The padding removal results in a notable visual effect when, e.g., hiding the TOC.

# [5.0.0](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/compare/v4.0.1...v5.0.0) (2023-06-16)

### Features

* **deps:** upgrade asyncapi-react to support AsyncAPI 2.6.0 ([542b437](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/542b4378c0429edc4d69e5ca98bd219b4a7f3c99))
* **deps:** update dependency swagger-ui to v4 ([fec82a7](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/fec82a706a5b52eb0a3c366f80a2b8d8dc8367fc))
* **deps:** update dependency mkdocs-material to v9.1.15 ([729c091](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/729c091897ebcc2c974a71213a83c76783ada1e9))
* **icons:** make Siemens UI icons available for user templates ([b74fb8d](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/b74fb8dab01aaf306c3240bafe4f31ade68edb5b))
* **icons:** make Siemens UI icons available in Markdown ([6697620](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/6697620bb8b04fa356268c3272e9dc9a028344f9))
* **licenses:** include licenses of JavaScript dependencies ([18563fa](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/18563fa9fad7337d17a51e70bb48ab00b6238061))
* **src:** clean up HTML distributed to users ([69a3d68](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/69a3d6849b5fa182795246b4d5931714f6b0918d))

### Bug Fixes

* **licenses:** detect more license fields ([36622b1](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/36622b1d249710271f730c34cfd24ec0438638de))
* **licenses:** set consistent width without sidebars or user overrides ([4944353](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/4944353a41dc266bf1a1bd70176722b8c650b213))
* **licenses:** show all licenses of packages if configured ([6ff7fe0](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/6ff7fe061f478805ed2c7a42bf04a7628766c9d8))
* **nav:** add missing back arrow in tablet view ([03fd72c](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/03fd72c6ba143326b4b67daee8289d0585c17e61))
* **nav:** show community link as external again ([8b8f528](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/8b8f528759150f1148edc6bfbfcd8b72e640058a))
* **openapi:** bundle oauth2-redirect.html as static template ([1cd57ed](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/1cd57ed0c91e707ef2c8b7057206f2d97e0d4025))
* **openapi:** ensure consistent oauth2-redirect URL ([987e3ae](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/987e3ae68bbb3fa689c38cf3fb4dbccb04b799be))
* **openapi:** fix arrow position in deprecated methods ([9735a6c](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/9735a6c3efeb853a7c981d951b3df7e70763fcd3))
* **search:** make the search clear button visible on mobile view ([0392e76](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/0392e76930518643a0127824ecf303ff01e48475))
* **search:** fix globe icon alignment, especially on mobile ([0eba4da](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/0eba4da9e6b90d09e593af3621f8637f1216bf42))

### BREAKING CHANGES

* **content-footer:** Hiding the community button and license text via the page frontmatter
  has changed to align with the upstream theme. See the Upgrade documentation for more
  details.
* **deps:** The upstream mkdocs-material theme has been upgraded
  to v9. The footer navigation is now opt-in, meaning you have to explicitly
  add `- navigation.footer` to your theme features in order for the
  previous/next page buttons to appear on your site.
* **deps:** The upstream mkdocs-material theme has been upgraded
  to v9. The mkdocs-material search plugin is now namespaced as `material/search`.
  This theme now wraps this plugin as `code-siemens-com-docs-theme/search`.
  When overriding search partial, this explicit naming must be preserved.

# [4.0.0](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/compare/v4.0.0-beta.5...v4.0.0) (2023-04-11)

### Features

* **mermaid:** use native Material integration ([d92c283](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/d92c28368e887e62a4135ffc08a4e88d6c23deea))
* **plugins:** support generating and parsing SBOMs ([c0c5c77](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/c0c5c77a35fd10680b277f6a5c5b0f299af0b0a4))
* add plugin to display third-party licenses ([657b17d](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/657b17d438e43b2130ac00fcef0143a60eec83c5))
* **fonts:** use native Siemens Professional fonts for different styles and weights ([c499511](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/c499511a731d96d29a78f02427eab3819a34ef12))
* do not preload logo ([0dab192](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/0dab19287229cf2afe81b4840e108435c55c3403))
* improve preloading and usage of fonts ([fdae508](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/fdae5086beba0f0018d46d8725cbc547d1bdec68))

### Bug Fixes

* **layout:** Remove redundant curly brace ([f79aca4](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/f79aca4d4fd2d4ceae3f3bb1d393093f3f10a3cf))
* **footer:** properly align Siemens footer ([a761001](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/a761001a77529f8eaaa4071dff4cb006bdacf940))
* **layout:** search overlays entire page on mobile ([f76e7b5](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/f76e7b5dca6268869d626030b4142ec0aabd93c7))
* **layout:** fix stacking ([9eca177](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/9eca177afc04ee0ed9dfe257d3f17a230593f798))
* **layout:** openapi issues ([a2b4c78](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/a2b4c78de4595967368585bc716cdf52a68af8f8))
* **layout:** show all of tertiary nav when scrolling down ([30d654d](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/30d654d821dea4d8a0f9d67caf0c27f505a80ede))
* **layout:** footer, copyright and social links ([ae68045](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/ae68045a92a775ce911aa7b0be9dc7199b13f8ee))
* realign navigation tree toggle ([4736f3a](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/4736f3a3e76d135e91e3f69b16ede4d3e6a3c59a))

### BREAKING CHANGES

* As of docs-theme v4.0.0, Python 3.8 and higher is supported.
* **deps:** mkdocs-material has been upgraded to v8.
* **ci:** New versions of the theme package are no longer published
  on the Siemens BT Artifactory. Users should change the PyPI index to
  point to the code.siemens.com package registry.
* **mermaid:** To get a better experience and mermaid theme matching
  the Siemens look-and-feel, users should migrate the superfences
  configuration from 'fence_div_format' to 'fence_code_format'.

<a name="3.0.0"></a>
# [3.0.0](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/compare/v3.0.0-beta.2...v3.0.0) (2022-02-03)

### Features

* **upstream:** use mkdocs-material as dependency ([c7b2e53](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/c7b2e538661d42a678de7eab449fcc60128e9e77))

### Bug Fixes

* **assets:** ensure theme styles load before extra_css ([d925b5c](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/d925b5cd8cfab86aaaeacc2a7456105fd2b117d9))
* **layout:** community link in tab bar ([8e5e8f0](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/8e5e8f05240a659ce9d95bf00ca897c5e201f702))
* **layout:** community button ([d9eab2e](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/d9eab2ed7dcea74f29c886baabda0d182322a515))
* **layout:** back to top button ([4ce082b](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/4ce082b4e9eef6e03e4ca20e783abf9f850ae1c5))
* **layout:** AsyncAPI mobile view issues ([54eea2f](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/54eea2f4cf3af0c4a03aea0460b64b3de00c8e38))

### BREAKING CHANGES

* **upgrade:** The plantuml-markdown package is no longer installed
  along with the theme, to avoid installing unneeded dependencies for
  all projects. If your project uses the PlantUML integration, you should
  add it to your project's Python direct dependencies explicitly.

* **upstream:** The mkdocs-material theme is now no longer bundled
  with this package, but used as a dependency and extended. As a result,
  the base.html template is not present in this package. If you use
  custom templates in your pages, you should extend main.html instead and
  adjust your template accordingly.


<a name="3.0.0-beta.2"></a>
# [3.0.0-beta.2](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/compare/v3.0.0-beta.1...v3.0.0-beta.2) (2022-02-01)

### Features

* **upstream:** use mkdocs-material as dependency ([f055ff0](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/f055ff058d313069eaeb65727f7493032ef2c138))

### Bug Fixes

* **assets:** ensure theme styles load before extra_css ([00880ec](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/00880ec53f0d9674589331ca27d5da79130cbb57))
* **layout:** community button ([a3be3a7](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/a3be3a7cdba1564d7f72facc2291c9613fface40))
* **layout:** back to top button ([67f0372](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/67f03728d9a02d9585f6679f26ebed493e4713d0))
* **layout:** OpenAPI deprecated block colors ([71e5870](https://code.siemens.com/code-ops/docs-theme/commit/71e5870aad6979698ba10d59827591d9548e94d9))

### BREAKING CHANGES

* **upstream:** The mkdocs-material theme is now no longer bundled
  with this package, but used as a dependency and extended. As a result,
  the base.html template is not present in this package. If you use
  custom templates in your pages, you should extend main.html instead and
  adjust your template accordingly.
